task:
/home/user/Documents/tinted.ply is an ASCII PLY with 250 colored points.

Export the cloud as an ASCII XYZ file at /home/user/Documents/tinted_plain.xyz with the RGB color stripped (either clear the colors first, or export with only the X, Y, Z columns enabled). The result must be a 3-column ASCII cloud with 250 points and no color columns.

verification.description: Output has no color columns (only X Y Z)
